children.type: ReactElement<any, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>> | ReactElement<any, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>>[] | ((provided: DroppableProvided, snapshot: DroppableStateSnapshot) => ReactNode)
children.description: ReactNode to render as this component's content

cloneDraggables.description: Makes its items immutable. Dragging creates cloned items that can be dropped elsewhere.

spacing.description: Adds padding to the droppable area

withPanel.description: Adds an EuiPanel style to the droppable area
